perturbation.original_text: Except as otherwise specified above in this Amendment, all other terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.changed_text: Except as otherwise specified above in this Amendment, all non-financial terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.explanation: The removal of 'financial' introduce a contradiction with the first section of the document, since it is being specified that all sections should be agreed upon, the agreement will have a very big issue with the financial terms in the agreement, since there is no specific information of such.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Except as otherwise specified above in this Amendment, all non-financial terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that "all other terms, conditions and covenants of the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect". The changed text limits this to "all non-financial terms". This creates a contradiction, as the contradicted text uses the phrase "all non-financial terms", thus creating a disparity in the terms that remain in full force and effect. As the explanation specifies, this causes a contradiction since there would be no specific information on the financial terms of the agreement.
